flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Mid-America Technology Center fell 19% between 2006 and 2009 (61.5% → 50.1%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Mid-America Technology Center rose 85% between 2006 and 2009 (116 → 215).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at Mid-America Technology Center are 59% above 6-year earnings ($24.2k → $38.5k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Mid-America Technology Center rose 44% between 2021 and 2024 (66.7% → 95.8%).
